title: Attention Monday Lovers!

posts.author: MsquareAutomation (Msquare Automation Solutions)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Makers,

Our Monday Automation series is live on our channel. We are curious to know your interest areas so that we can create more exciting automation videos to save your time & money

Comment the names of SaaS applicationz you wish to connect with Monday so we can come up with those videos in coming days.

Start watching the training here:

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCqidlIIwbejxZmRUWBICcjQ

posts.author: jailynnlucidday (Jai-Lynn Hoops)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would love to see any (or ALL) of the following:

  1. Google Calendar
  2. PandaDoc (or other Invoicing/signature/payment software)
  3. Tracket (or other time tracking software)
  4. Social Media platforms for Managment, post creation, and/or analytics.
  5. Bulk email platforms (Mailchimp, Hubspot, etc.)
